location: Random drop from Putrid Crystalian enemies, most reliably the pair in the room next to the Elphael Inner Wall grace in Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree.
tactics: Putrid Crystalians fight like regular Crystalians — tanky in their crystal form, but they break apart into weaker limbed sub-enemies once damaged enough
Drop rate is a relatively generous 8%, so the pair by Elphael Inner Wall is an efficient farm spot
Don't confuse this with the non-rotten Crystal Spear found earlier in Sellia Hideaway — they look nearly identical, but this one inflicts scarlet rot instead of dealing pure magic damage
Elphael is deep into Miquella's Haligtree, reached via Consecrated Snowfield, so this isn't accessible until well into the late game
lore: Another crystal spear beyond ordinary human craft, but left to fester — its magic corrupted into something that spreads scarlet rot on contact.

builds.name: Rot poke build
builds.why: D Dexterity/E Intelligence scaling plus a hefty built-in scarlet rot buildup (55) make it a strong budget rot-status weapon
